steps.title: Find the width
steps.content:
The base area is $63t$, and the length is $\frac{21}{4}$. Divide area by length:
$$
63t\div \frac{21}{4}=63t\cdot \frac{4}{21}=12t
$$

steps.title: Find the face areas
steps.content:
The three different face areas are the base, the front face, and the side face:
$$
63t,\quad \frac{21}{4}\cdot 4=21,\quad 12t\cdot 4=48t
$$

steps.title: Double and add
steps.content: A rectangular prism has two of each face: $$ 2(63t+21+48t)=2(111t+21)=222t+42 $$ The answer is B.
